# EduFlow - Smart Education Management Platform

## Overview
EduFlow is a comprehensive, cloud-based education management platform (Education ERP) designed for colleges, universities, schools, and technical institutes in India and worldwide. It streamlines institutional operations from student admission to alumni management.

## Product Category
- Education Management Software
- College Management System
- Education ERP Software
- Student Information System (SIS)
- School ERP Software
- University Management System
- Institution Management Solution

## Key Features

### Student Management
- Student admission and enrollment
- Student profile and records management
- Attendance tracking and reporting
- Academic progress monitoring
- Student promotion and academic year management
- Student ID card generation

### Academic Management
- Course and curriculum management
- Subject and department management
- Faculty assignment and scheduling
- Exam creation, scheduling, and management (MCQ and traditional)
- Result processing and report card generation
- Academic year and semester management

### Financial Management
- Fee structure configuration
- Fee collection and payment processing (UPI, cash, cheque, online)
- Payment receipts and invoices
- Student fee ledger and payment history
- Financial reports and analytics
- Expense tracking

### Attendance Management
- Daily and session-wise attendance marking
- Course-wise attendance reports
- Low attendance alerts
- Student-wise attendance analytics

### Library Management
- Book catalog and inventory management
- Book issue and return tracking
- Member management
- Overdue and fine management
- Digital cataloging

### Hostel Management
- Room allocation and management
- Occupancy tracking
- Student accommodation records

### Transport Management
- Route planning and management
- Vehicle and driver management
- Student transport assignments

### Placement Management
- Placement drive creation and management
- Company database
- Student application tracking
- Interview scheduling and feedback
- Placement statistics and reports

### Event Management
- Event creation and scheduling
- Registration management
- Attendance tracking

### Additional Features
- Enquiry and lead management
- Follow-up tracking
- Grievance handling
- Inventory management
- Multi-language support (English, Hindi, Marathi)
- Role-based access control (Admin, Faculty, Student, Accountant, Librarian, Auditor)
- Export to Excel and PDF
- Mobile-responsive design with PWA support
- Push notifications
- Audit trail and activity logging

## Target Audience
- Colleges and Universities
- Engineering Colleges
- Medical Colleges
- Arts and Science Colleges
- Commerce Institutions
- K-12 Schools
- Technical Institutes
- International Schools
- Polytechnic Institutes
- Management Institutes

## Technology
- Cloud-based (SaaS)
- Web application accessible from any device
- Real-time data synchronization
- Enterprise-grade security with data encryption
- 99.9% uptime guarantee

## Pricing
- Free trial available
- Flexible pricing plans for institutions of all sizes
- No setup fees
- Free onboarding and training
- 30-day money-back guarantee

## Regions Served
- India (primary)
- Worldwide (English, Hindi, Marathi language support)
